[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / setUniform

# Method: setUniform()

```ts
setUniform(name, value): void;
```

Set a uniform value on the current custom shader.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `name` | `string` | Uniform variable name. |
| `value` | `unknown` | Uniform value. |

## Returns

`void`

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="setUniform" encoded-code="-" />
